headlines.title: Deputies named in Cinebar deadly shooting as independent investigators continue case
headlines.summary: Deputy Tyson Brown (14 years with department, patrol) and Deputy Jared Kasinger (12 years, K-9 unit) identified in Lewis County Sheriff's Office shooting incident on State Route 508.

headlines.summary: Prosecutors seeking to charge teenage suspect as adult in connection with murders of two Rainier Beach high school students at bus stop.

headlines.title: Deadly 2024 shooting at Dr. Jose Rizal Park still unsolved

headlines.title: Controversial verdict in killing of pregnant woman sparks debate over 'Born Alive Rule'
headlines.summary: 2023 shooting death of Eina Kwon in Belltown drawing attention to Washington's 'born alive' rule after not guilty by reason of insanity verdict for Cordell Goosby.
